# sevalla_docker_registry (Resource)

Manages a Sevalla Docker registry credential.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Docker Hub registry
resource "sevalla_docker_registry" "dockerhub" {
  name     = "my-dockerhub"
  registry = "dockerHub"
  username = var.dockerhub_username
  secret   = var.dockerhub_token
}

# GitHub Container Registry
resource "sevalla_docker_registry" "ghcr" {
  name     = "my-ghcr"
  registry = "github"
  username = var.github_username
  secret   = var.github_token
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the Docker registry credential.
- `secret` (String, Sensitive) The secret (password/token) for the Docker registry. Write-only; not returned by the API.
- `username` (String, Sensitive) The username for the Docker registry.

### Optional

- `registry` (String) The Docker registry type (e.g., gcr, ecr, dockerHub, github, gitlab, digitalOcean, custom).

### Read-Only

- `company_id` (String) The company ID that owns the Docker registry credential.
- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the Docker registry credential was created.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the Docker registry credential.
- `updated_at` (String) The timestamp when the Docker registry credential was last updated.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import sevalla_docker_registry.dockerhub a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890
```
